name: Earth-Panda Advanced Magnetic Material Co.,Ltd.
summary: Earth-Panda Advance Magnetic Material Co., Ltd. engages in the production and operation of rare-earth permanent magnetic materials. It offers sintered NdFeB, bonded NdFeB, rubber, and SmCo magnets. Its products are used in various applications in information technology, national defense, automobile, wind power, various electric motors, instruments, medical and magnetic machinery, and other sectors in Europe, the Americas, and Southeast Asia. The company is based in Hefei, China.
